Royal Ascot Tickets

Royal Ascot is the most celebrated flat racing event in the world, attracting the biggest names in the sport alongside global royalty and style icons. Held each June at Ascot Racecourse in Berkshire, the five-day festival features over 30 races including eight at Group 1 level. Compare hospitality packages, enclosure passes, and grandstand tickets across all our partner sites.
